entries.title: Page edit preview actions.
entries.waitFor: button[title="Preview current unsaved changes without saving"], button:has-text("Changes")
entries.notes: Capture the Page edit header with the Preview group showing the separate `Changes` and `Live page` actions.
entries.useCase: An editor chooses between a temporary unsaved preview and the saved public page.

entries.title: Signed unsaved preview modal.
entries.notes: Follow-up capture for the Preview Changes modal after a temporary signed snapshot URL has been minted.
entries.useCase: An editor previews unsaved Page and Layout Builder changes through the real frontend pipeline without saving.

entries.title: Filament Peek device preset controls.
entries.notes: Follow-up capture for fullscreen, tablet, and mobile preview device presets exposed through Capell configuration.
entries.useCase: An editor checks the unsaved preview at different device widths before publishing.

entries.title: Expired preview friendly error page.
entries.notes: Follow-up capture for the private no-store preview error response when a signed snapshot expires or cannot be read.
entries.useCase: An editor opening an old preview link sees a safe, friendly error instead of leaked snapshot details.
